name: Sorciere de Fleur
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>時</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>花</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－フルール・ド・ソルシエール
name_jp_rom: Tokibana no Majo - Furūru Do Sorushiēru
name_jp_tl: Witch of the Time Flower - Fleur de Sorciere
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it to your field, but it cannot attack your opponent directly, and is destroyed during the End Phase of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Sorciere de Fleur" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it to your field, but it cannot attack your opponent directly, and is destroyed during the End Phase of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Sorciere de Fleur" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it to your field, but it cannot attack your opponent directly, and is destroyed during the End Phase of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Sorciere de Fleur" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
